name: Personal Injury Liability Assignment Exclusion

eligibility.description: Applies to structured settlement companies (assignees) that take over payment obligations from defendants in physical injury lawsuits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Amounts received by an assignee for assuming a liability to make periodic payments for personal injury or sickness are excluded from gross income to the extent used to purchase qualified funding assets.
